projectDescription: A Java SDK for building cross-platform 3D geospatial desktop applications, providing an interactive virtual globe with high-resolution terrain, imagery layers, and rich geospatial data visualization using OpenGL.
keyFeatures: Interactive 3D virtual globe rendering with OpenGL via JOGL
High-resolution terrain using elevation models (DTED, BIL, GeoTIFF, WCS)
Tiled imagery layer system with WMS, WCS, and local raster sources
Rich shape and renderable library (polygons, paths, extruded shapes, airspaces, surface shapes)
OGC standards support (WMS, WCS, WFS, KML, COLLADA, GML)
Geospatial data import (Shapefile, GeoJSON, DTED, RPF, VPF, GeoTIFF, GDAL)
Flexible layer architecture with built-in layers (stars, compass, placenames, graticule)
Camera/view system with orbit and first-person controllers
Picking and selection event system for interactive objects
Caching system for GPU resources, memory, and file stores
Swing/AWT integration via WorldWindowGLCanvas and WorldWindowGLJPanel
